name: .NET Privilege Escalation
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability in .NET allows a local attacker to gain elevated privileges.

name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset DoS
description: The HTTP/2 protocol allows denial of service via rapid stream creation and immediate RST_STREAM.

name: .NET NuGet Client Elevation of Privilege
description: NuGet client in .NET SDK allows a local attacker to gain elevated privileges via a crafted package.

name: .NET Framework XML Deserialization RCE
description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in .NET Framework when processing XML data via DataSet and DataTable deserialization.

name: JWT Validation Bypass
description: Microsoft Identity libraries for ASP.NET Core allow a JWT validation bypass when certain issuer validation options are configured.

name: X.509 Chain Building Bypass
description: A vulnerability in .NET X.509 certificate chain building allows an attacker to construct a certificate chain that bypasses validation.

name: .NET Elevation of Privilege via FTP
description: An elevation of privilege vulnerability in .NET allows URI injection attacks when using System.Net.FtpWebRequest.

name: ASP.NET Core Security Feature Bypass
description: A security feature bypass in ASP.NET Core allows an attacker to bypass HTTPS-only restrictions.

name: .NET Information Disclosure
description: An information disclosure vulnerability in .NET allows an attacker to access sensitive cryptographic information.

name: .NET Denial of Service
description: A denial of service vulnerability exists in .NET when processing certain HTTP requests.

name: .NET Core Remote Code Execution
description: A buffer overflow in the .NET Core runtime enables remote code execution when processing specially crafted data.

name: .NET Framework Remote Code Execution
description: An RCE vulnerability exists in .NET Framework when software fails to check the source markup of a file.

name: .NET Framework SOAP WSDL Parser RCE
description: A remote code execution vulnerability in .NET Framework SOAP WSDL parser allows code injection via crafted WSDL content.

name: ASP.NET Core Brute Force Bypass
description: A security feature bypass allows attackers to bypass account lockout via race condition in authentication.

name: .NET Information Disclosure via TLS
description: An information disclosure vulnerability in .NET allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information through TLS handshake.

name: .NET Race Condition RCE
description: A race condition in .NET when processing HTTP requests can lead to use-after-free and potential remote code execution.

name: ASP.NET Core Denial of Service
description: An unauthenticated remote attacker can cause a denial of service by sending specially crafted requests.

name: .NET Remote Code Execution
description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in .NET when processing certain types of requests.

name: .NET Framework RCE via XAML
description: A remote code execution vulnerability in .NET Framework via XAML parser allows code injection when processing untrusted input.

name: .NET Use-After-Free Elevation of Privilege
description: A use-after-free in .NET WPF can be exploited by a local attacker to gain elevated privileges.
